title: Who's There?: Ghost Players
description: Adds entities with random names that spawn in caves and walk to spook the player
body:
_You are in a cave, a very deep cave. You have been mining for many hours in search of diamonds. It's getting late, you are tired. Suddenly you see a white square in the corner of your screen and it disappears as quickly as it appeared. You swear it looked like the name of another player, but you brush it off as a simple rendering bug..._

**But what if it wasn't?**
___________________________________________________________________________________

''Who's There?'' adds in entities that will sometimes appear when exploring caves. They are invisible and have names that look like the names of players. They walk around you and make noises to make you uneasy while you are mining.

On top of that, a variant of the Ghost Player simply named ''White Eyes'' can spawn, stalking the player through the caves.

_In the distance you see what looks like another player. You rub your eyes, telling yourself that such a thing is impossible, you're in singleplayer! When you look back at your screen, the figure is still there, standing completely still. You heard of Herobrine before, but that thing isn't Herobrine, it's different somehow..._
___________________________________________________________________________________

![Name appears](https://media0.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExcWpvY2FxNzhpZzBicjUyYzFlZjVhdWl1djZvbmEzaXJ4Ym81cDNveiZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/qJdW6wBwt6ZRV05and/giphy.gif)
